title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Zerodha - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Zerodha - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Zerodha in Kanpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Zerodha:
Zerodha is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zerodha!
